description: Values returned by Fluentd MQTT instantiation

mqtt-host.title: MQTT broker host
mqtt-host.description: MQTT broker host to which Fluentd is subscribed

mqtt-port.title: MQTT broker port
mqtt-port.description: MQTT broker port to which Fluentd is subscribed

mqtt-topic.title: MQTT topic
mqtt-topic.description: MQTT topic to which Fluentd is subscribed
